info.title: message-recording
info.description: The message-recording command-line utility allows to display both staged and persisted message recordings, persist staged recordings to the user-defined persistence storage (e.g., SQL Server database), and stage persisted ones back to the specified digital twin deployment.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: ScaleOut Digital Twins Message Recording Management Tool

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Authentication logic with identity service provider.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Retrieve and display the list of message recordings of the specified type.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Get the status of the specified message recording.

commands.name: stage
commands.description: Stage a specified message recording (or all persisted recordings).

commands.name: persist
commands.description: Persist a specified message recording (or all staged recordings).

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete either a specified message recording or all message recordings of a certain type (staged or persisted).
